scrape.description:
**For Sale: 2 Bedroom Apartment at Harbour Point Tower 2, Dubai Creek Harbour**

Price: AED 4,300,000
Size: 1,094.9 sq. ft. 
Bedrooms: 2
Bathrooms: 2
Furnishing: Fully Furnished

Presenting an exquisite 2 bedroom apartment located in Harbour Point Tower 2 within the prestigious Dubai Creek Harbour. This thoughtfully designed residence offers a spacious 1,094.9 sq. ft. layout, featuring two well appointed bedrooms and two modern bathrooms. The apartment comes fully furnished, ready for immediate occupancy. 

Residents will enjoy stunning lagoon views that enhance the tranquil living experience. The property boasts a range of premium amenities including a fully equipped open kitchen with modern appliances, a private balcony, and fitted interiors. Additional conveniences include elevator access, covered parking, a welcoming lobby, and round the clock security ensuring safety and comfort. 

The development offers access to a shared gym and is situated within close proximity to prominent landmarks such as Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary and The Tower, making it an ideal choice for nature lovers and urban dwellers alike. 

This property is presented by fam Properties, Dubai s largest and most trusted real estate agency with over 700 agents operating from 24 locations across the city. With a client satisfaction rating of 4.9 out of 5 stars from more than 9,200 happy clients, fam Properties ensures a seamless and professional transaction experience. The apartment is developed by Emaar, a renowned name synonymous with quality and excellence in real estate. 

For further details or to arrange a viewing, please contact fam Properties today. 



**Amenities:**
Kitchen Appliances
Balcony
Elevator
Fitted Interiors
Furnished
Lagoon & Sea View
Open Kitchen
Shared Gym
Security
Covered Parking
Lobby in Building
Water Supply

**Nearby Attractions:**
Ras Al Khor Wildlife Sanctuary
The Tower



Secure this exceptional property in one of Dubai s most sought after communities. Experience premium living at Harbour Point Tower 2, Dubai Creek Harbour.
scrape.listing_title: Sea View | Fully Furnished | Luxury Living
